subject: Book 4x more meetings with a sales process that runs itself
body:
Automate your outreach, route inbound leads, and see how one team grew pipeline 400%.  

 

Apollo ( https://app.apollo.io/?utm_campaign=20260310_NEWS_GLBL_March10ContentNewsletterFree&utm_content=20260310_NEWS_GLBL_March10ContentNewsletterFree_EML_FREE_March10ContentNewsletterFree_F2P_EN&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cio#/people )

 

 

the playbook

 

Hi Meeko,

 

Still buried in manual tasks? This week, we're sharing three ways to cut the busywork: automate your outreach, route inbound leads automatically, and see how one team replaced tool chaos with 400% more pipeline.
